creator: fbsdbugs4@sentry.org
text:
OS: FreeBSD 12-STABLE r351730
Hardware: External USB 3.0 2.5" disk case

USBconfig shows:

...
ugen3.4: <vendor 0x1f75 product 0x0621> at usbus3, cfg=255 md=HOST spd=HIGH (480Mbps) pwr=OFF (500mA)
...

Vendor ID 0x1f75 is Innostor Technology Corporation
Product ID 0x0621 is an IS621 USB 3.0 to SATA Storage Controller
